title: Shinji as a puppy NGE NME discussion
display_title: Shinji as a puppy NGE NME discussion
wikitext:
[]: Shinji as a puppy- NGE/NME discussion             Quote Post by Azathoth » Mon Apr 18, 2011 11:09 pm Something I found while looking over the Platinum subs for episode 08 (so...take them with a grain of salt I guess, but Platinum subs are usually pretty reliable, right?). This is from the scene where Kaji has lunch with Misato and the kids, it's playing on the TV in the background. It's not the only time Eva uses incidental TV programs as not-so-subtle humorous commentary on the current scene but I for one had never noticed it before. It's kind of hard to tell who's speaking but M is the male character and F is the female one, as best I can tell: {Kaji foot-groping Misato} M:My God, why are you so cold? F:Because your fire has gone out. {Misato, bad-tempered} M:Outside it's a red hot summer, over 100 degrees. {Kaji's foot goes a little further up...Misato closes her legs} M:What is this freezing cold? {confused Asuka watching Kaji smirk} F:My heart is below freezing. {Kaji addresses Shinji} M:My beer is frozen too. I need a coat. {Kaji makes inappropriate remark} M:Your heart has too much air conditioning. M:Why don't you raise the temperature? {reactions} F:You're the air conditioner. {raging Misato} M:You're so stupid, venting your heat externally. {Kaji puts on his trollface} F:The more heat you vent, the colder my heart. M:Then, let us warm your frozen body together! {Asuka stuck in reaction, Shinji clueless} F:I'm sorry, you can't light my heart... {Kaji holds up finger of wisdom and praises Shinji's ability} F:...put logs on my fire, and stoke me with oil. M:Who is it? It can't be... Is it that guy? {Shinji cheerful, Asuka grumpy - slow zoom in on her face} F:No, it's this puppy. M:You're telling me that I lost to this puppy? F:Yes, he's a good boy. {Kaji stands up to leave} F:And he's faithful, unlike some people!

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Mon Apr 18, 2011 11:32 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by Deyno » Tue Apr 19, 2011 1:12 am Rebuild of Evangelion?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Apr 19, 2011 7:18 am [s:137g20zm]Are you sure you got this out of Episode 08 and not a later episode? Episode 08 was aboard the aircraft carrier and there was no time for a TV show anywhere in that episode.[/s:137g20zm] No kidding. It looks like I never paid any attention to that chatter in the background. I kept thinking it was just a set of carrier PA announcements. Nice for pointing that out! Also, changed the thread title to reflect the contents of this discussion more appropriately.

[]:             Quote Post by Kodaemon » Tue Apr 19, 2011 8:24 am It is ep. 8, when they all have coffee aboard the carrier.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Tue Apr 19, 2011 12:23 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Tue Apr 19, 2011 2:12 pm Seele00TextOnly wrote: My good-natured joke of wanting to bring up the Math Puppy whenever remotely appropriate aside

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Apr 19, 2011 6:06 pm The background chatter was there originally--you can see the "puppy" dialogue for the subtitles in the Theory & Analysis Asuka and Shinji page: http://wiki.evageeks.org/Theory_and_Analysis:Shinji_and_Asuka%27s_Relationship (Maybe it was in some images that were since removed from the page.) Also: What's strange is the background chatter about the puppy/etc isn't translated on my Platinum disc (single disc set) but I know tons of other background scenes are properly translated for Platinum. Strange. I don't have much to say because I did at least know about the Episode 08 = Shinji = puppy connection with 2.0.... Although, I do think both scenes in 2.0 and episode 08 (besides the Misato/Kaji/Shinji weirdness and Asuka rivalry-jealousy) carry the meaning that Shinji is a puppy as in he's Nerv's bitch. It fits Shinji with his "obediently following orders" personality, after all. And I guess on a deeper level, Shinji following orders without knowing what he's really getting into with Nerv's hidden agenda. Although most of the characters fit into that category.
